text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Boss. I let ya down again...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Boss. I let ya down again...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Looks like victory has turned its back on me, huh?
What was the point in all that effort?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Damn it! What am I supposed to do?!
choice_data_list:
If you've still got the energy to yell like that,
you'll be fine!

If you've still got the energy to yell like that,
you'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Damn it! What am I supposed to do?!
choice_data_list:
If you've still got the energy to yell like that,
you'll be fine!

If you've still got the energy to yell like that,
you'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh. The heck am I talkin' about? I shoulda just
asked ya from the start!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm all ears! Tell me all the ways I can fix my
flaws!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just gimme the plan, and I'll get right to the
grind!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thinkin' about it, there's no use cryin' over spilled
milk. If I got time to whine, I should be spendin' it
on the track instead!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I'm feelin' a bit better now. So, let's get
down to some trainin'!
